---
title: "lognormal_prior"
generated: true
description: "Build a log-normal lengthscale prior with median `exp(mu)`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.priors`](../nitrix-stats-priors.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:lognormal_prior -->
```python
lognormal_prior(mu: float, sd: float) -> PriorFn
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:lognormal_prior -->
Build a log-normal lengthscale prior with median `exp(mu)`.

The prior density is
$p(\rho) \propto (1/\rho) \exp(-(\log \rho - \mu)^2 / (2\,\sigma^2))$
on $\rho > 0$, so the returned penalty is
$-\log p(\rho) = (\log \rho - \mu)^2 / (2\,\sigma^2) + \log \rho$
(up to an additive constant): a pull that is symmetric in
$\log \rho$, toward the prior median $\exp(\mu)$ with
multiplicative spread $\sigma$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:lognormal_prior -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mu` | `float` | — | — | Prior mean $\mu$ of $\log \rho$ (so $\exp(\mu)$ is the prior median lengthscale). |
| `sd` | `float` | — | — | Prior standard deviation $\sigma$ of $\log \rho$ (must be positive). |

**Returns** `PriorFn`. A callable mapping a scalar lengthscale $\rho$ (shape `()`) to the scalar negative log-density $-\log p(\rho)$ (shape `()`), suitable for the `map_rho=` argument of [`nitrix.stats.gp_fit`](../nitrix-stats.qmd) and [`nitrix.stats.hgp_fit`](../nitrix-stats.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
